page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.large is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor demonstrates average single-core performance, as evidenced by its stress-ng single-core CPU and Geekbench single-core scores. However, multi-core performance is limited, falling into the bottom 10% for multi-core stress-ng, Geekbench, and PassMark CPU tests. This discrepancy is expected given the low core count of the instance. Memory bandwidth tests also show lower-tier performance, with uncached read and write speeds categorized in the bottom 10%, and a PassMark memory score in the bottom 25%.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfr7.large offers a dedicated CPU allocation and a high memory-to-core ratio for workloads requiring more memory than compute power, without the overhead of larger multi-core instances. However, the trade-off is constrained multi-threaded processing and lower memory throughput. This instance is best suited for lightweight memory-bound workloads, small database nodes, caching layers, or basic web serving applications that do not demand high parallel processing or high-speed local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.large is a memory-optimized instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides 8.0 GB of memory per core but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, utilizing a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but poor multi-core and memory bandwidth results, placing it in the lower percentiles for parallel processing and data throughput. Qualitatively, it offers a cost-efficient entry point for memory-heavy workloads that do not require extensive CPU cores. It is best suited for small-scale databases, caching systems, and lightweight memory-bound applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.large is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight memory-bound workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and a high memory-to-CPU ratio for lightweight workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz
16.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio
Average single-core performance with limited multi-core processing power
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for small databases, caching layers, and memory-bound applications
